# GitHub Directory Guidance

Repository-wide agent governance lives in [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) — read it in full, not summarized or partially, before making any change under `.github/**`.

Follow the root guidance for all `.github/**` changes too, especially workflow validation (`actionlint`), secret/variable handling, and issue/PR linking rules. See root `AGENTS.md` rules 50 and 51 in particular — read them there, this file does not restate their content, so there is nothing here that can drift out of sync with them.
